subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1914-01-06
subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God that you have come and blessed your foreheads at the Court of Sanctification. You obtained the inestimable privilege of access to worship
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @praise and encouragement, @station; mission; authority of Abdu'l-Baha, @unity; oneness of humanity, @the Bab; the Primal Point; station and claims of the Bab, @humility; meekness; lowliness, @station of the Manifestation of God
